overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Watch Dogs: Legion showing a character walking through a futuristic London at night. The character passes a neon-lit gas station, protest barricades with a red android figure, and narrow alleys before looking up at a drone flying between skyscrapers.

crossing the street toward the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through city intersection toward a gas station with red neon lighting

person walking in the distance across the street

tall modern building with curved glass facade and horizontal metal rings
white car parked along the curb
trees with autumn foliage lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open urban intersection at night, approaching a gas station illuminated by red neon lights. A white car is parked on the right while a tall cylindrical glass tower rises in the background.

passing close by red android statue holding protest sign

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a tiled sidewalk past protest barricades covered in signs. A distinctive red android statue stands near the fence holding a sign, while the cylindrical tower remains visible in the left background.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a main city street where a large digital billboard displays a news broadcast on a historic brick building. A bus shelter with advertisements appears on the right as the character continues forward.

events.description: entering narrow alley with purple neon lighting and brick walls

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley with neon signs, passing outdoor seating, then crossing the street

red metal chairs and tables on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow alleyway illuminated by a bright purple neon sign. The space features exposed brick walls, a red awning, and outdoor seating before opening back to the street for a crosswalk.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at tall cylindrical skyscraper
drone aircraft appears flying between buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing street and looking up at tall cylindrical skyscraper and flying drone overhead

notable_agents.action: white van driving down the street
motorcycle with rider passing by on the right

entered.detail: building with circular illuminated logo on stone facade
illuminated aircraft with purple lights flying between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street and looks up at a massive cylindrical glass tower rising into the night sky. A flying drone with purple lights hovers between the skyscrapers while vehicles pass on the street below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic London, transitioning from open urban intersections into narrow alleys before ending with a gaze toward the towering skyline. It begins at a night-time intersection, moving past a red neon-lit gas station and a parked white car with a cylindrical glass tower looming in the distance. As the character proceeds along a tiled sidewalk, the scene shifts past protest barricades and a red android statue before opening onto a main street featuring a large digital news billboard on a historic brick building. The camera then turns into a narrow alleyway illuminated by a bright purple neon sign and red awnings, passing outdoor seating before emerging back onto a city crosswalk. Finally, the perspective tilts upward from the street level to reveal the massive glass tower and a purple-lit drone hovering between the skyscrapers.
